caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a green t-shirt with the white text "I NEVER DO THAT" and a green baseball cap. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features walls adorned with framed photographs and clothing racks with various apparel, including a white t-shirt on a mannequin. In the lower corners of the scene, logos are visible: one on the left featuring a circular emblem and the text "THE HUB" and another on the right with red stylized text that reads "DON'T BE A TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man is captured in mid-conversation, with his head tilting slightly and his mouth moving as he speaks, while the camera remains stationary, focusing on his upper body and facial expressions.
